---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new or an improvement to existing functionality
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of what you're proposing.

## Use case

Who is this for, and what problem does it solve? Be specific — a real scenario is more useful than an abstract description.

## Proposed solution

How you'd expect it to work. API shape, UI behavior, or workflow description.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why this one is better.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues, or anything else that provides useful background.
